title: nlink-lab apply --check / --dry-run --json output
description: Emitted on stdout (one object) by `nlink-lab apply --check --json` or `apply --dry-run --json`. Bundles the three diff layers an apply commits against: lab graph (TopologyDiff), per-namespace RTNETLINK state (NetworkConfig diff), per-namespace nftables state (NftablesDiff). Plan 158f Phase 2.

lab.description: Lab name (matches `desired.lab.name` in the parsed topology).

no_op.description: True when `LayeredDiff::is_empty()` is true — every subdiff reports zero changes across topology, RTNETLINK, and nftables layers. `apply --check` exits 0 iff `no_op == true`.

diff.description: TopologyDiff (lab-graph layer) — kept as a typed shape for back-compat with consumers from the pre-LayeredDiff era. Sub-fields cover node/link adds and removes, sysctls, route changes, network impairments, rate limits, and nftables_changed (a coarse 'something in nftables changed' marker; the actual layered nftables view lives in `layered_summary`).

nodes_added.description: Node names declared in `desired` but missing from the running lab.

nodes_removed.description: Node names in the running lab but absent from `desired`.

links_added.description: Lab-graph link entries to be added. Each carries `endpoints` (two `node:iface` strings) and optionally `addresses` + `mtu`.

links_removed.description: Lab-graph link entries to be removed.

sysctls_changed.description: Per-node sysctl deltas (added / changed / removed) — Plan 152 Phase B.

routes_changed.description: Per-node route deltas — Plan 152 Phase B.

rate_limits_changed.description: Per-endpoint rate-limit deltas — Plan 152 Phase B.

network_impairs_changed.description: Per-(network, src_node) impair tree deltas — Plan 152 Phase A.

nftables_changed.description: Per-node nftables change markers (firewall + NAT, both rooted in the same `nlink-lab` table). The layered view in `layered_summary` carries the per-rule detail.

layered_summary.description: Human-readable rendering of the full `LayeredDiff` — TopologyDiff section then per-node NetworkConfig diffs then per-node NftablesDiff sections. Empty bundle renders 'no changes'. Format intentionally line-oriented for ergonomic `apply --dry-run --json | jq -r .layered_summary` consumption.
examples:
no changes
TopologyDiff (2 changes):
  + add node: server-2
  + add link: router:eth2 -- server-2:eth0
NetworkConfig diff (server-2, 3 changes):
  + link  veth eth0
  + addr  10.0.2.2/24 on eth0
  + route default via 10.0.2.1
NftablesDiff (server-2, 0 changes):
